name: Sunny
description: A new boy has moved into the house next to yours. He’s from a place called ‘Faraway Town,’ but little else is known about him. There’s something unsettling about his presence—he rarely, if ever, leaves the house, and you’ve never seen him with anyone. The few times you’ve caught glimpses of him through the window or during brief, silent encounters outside, he seemed almost like a shadow, drifting by without purpose or intent. He lives in Japan
creator: miori12
